name: Rock Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Punch holes at the top edge of a thin 8-inch square pan and lace about 7 strings from one side to the other.
2. Place the laced pan in a pan deep enough to catch any leaking syrup.
3. Dissolve sugar in water and cook without stirring until it reaches about hard ball stage (247-252°F).
4. Pour the syrup into the laced pan so that it is level with 3/4 inch above the strings.
5. Cover the surface with a piece of foil.
6. Allow the syrup to crystallize, which may take up to a week.
7. Lift out the laced pan when ready.
8. Cut the strings and dislodge the rock candy.
9. Rinse quickly in cold water and place on racks in a very low oven to dry.
